title: Lucid Announces Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Lucid reported Q3 2024 revenue of $200.1 million, exceeding analyst consensus of $196.3 million and up significantly from $137.8 million in Q3 2023. The company delivered 2,781 vehicles in Q3, up from 1,457 in Q3 2023. Production reached approximately 3,026 vehicles in Q3, demonstrating continued ramp execution. However, gross margin remained deeply negative at -103% as the company continued operating at substantial losses. Net loss for the quarter reached $992.5 million. Lucid maintained its 2024 full-year production guidance of approximately 9,000 vehicles. The company highlighted progress on the Gravity SUV, which was expected to launch in late 2024. Management noted that Q4 would see the beginning of Gravity deliveries, which could boost Q4 and 2025 revenue materially.
